specs.name: Optimizer Configuration Models
specs.topic: The optimizer defines structured config schemas parsed from YAML consumed by all modules

specs.name: Run Lifecycle State Machine
specs.topic: The optimizer defines numeric state codes that track a run from creation through terminal states

specs.name: Repository Loading
specs.topic: The optimizer clones or locates a repository and provides its path for downstream modules

specs.name: Idea Generation Module
specs.topic: The IdeaGenerator module accepts company context, a prompt, and optional prior ideas to produce a structured idea

specs.name: LLM Judge Scoring
specs.topic: The LLM judge evaluates a generated idea against company context across four scoring dimensions

specs.name: Reference Example Generation
specs.topic: The optimizer generates or loads calibration examples that seed the optimization pipeline

specs.name: Optimization Pipeline
specs.topic: The optimizer refines the IdeaGenerator through sequential instruction tuning then evolutionary refinement

specs.name: Optimizer Engine
specs.topic: The optimizer runs as a long-lived process with WebSocket server, command queues, and a worker thread
